title_en: Return to the Ronin-Verse: Get an Exclusive New Look Inside TMNT: The Last Ronin - Training Day #1
summary_en: With the Ronin-Verse hotter than ever, IGN can exclusively debut a new preview of TMNT: The Last Ronin - Training Day#1.
body_en:
In 2026, it seems like TMNT: The Last Ronin mania is burning brighter than ever. The original series is set to receive a novelization soon, and we just learned that PlatinumGames has now taken charge of The Last Ronin video game . Meanwhile, on the comic book side of things, IDW is gearing up for the release of the latest spinoff, TMNT: The Last Ronin: Training Day.
With today marking the final order cutoff for TMNT: The Last Ronin: Training Day #1, IGN can exclusively debut a new preview of the book. Check out the slideshow gallery below to see two new pages of interior art, along with the previously revealed covers:
Training Day reunites the original Last Ronin creative team, including writers Kevin Eastman and Tom Waltz, artists the Escorza brothers and Ben Bishop, and colorist Luis Antonio Delgado. Here's the official logline for the issue:
This makes Training Day the fourth book in the Last Ronin saga, following the original 2020 miniseries, 2022's TMNT: The Last Ronin - The Lost Years, and 2023's TMNT: The Last Ronin II - Re-Evolution. Eastman and Waltz confirmed to IGN that another direct sequel is in the works , though we don't know the release date yet.
TMNT: The Last Ronin - Training Day #1 will be released on July 15, 2026. You can preorder a copy at your local comic shop .
Jesse is a mild-mannered staff writer for IGN. Allow him to lend a machete to your intellectual thicket by following @jschedeen on BlueSky .
